_meta.note: Daemon-backed bounded PTY stdin write. The request field is bytes; writes are denied while a secret prompt is active so LLM-supplied secrets are not forwarded.

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: PTY command runtime is not available on this platform yet (ConPTY support pending)

secret_input_denied_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [SecretInputDenied]: secret prompt active; LLM-supplied input denied

invariants: bytes is a UTF-8 string capped at 4096 bytes by the daemon
response reports bytes_written and post-write secret_prompt_active only
secret prompts produce a typed SecretInputDenied error and the bytes are not written
success payload never contains echoed stdin, PTY output, or screen content
